models.Name: gemini-2.5-flash-lite
models.Description: The 'Speed Runner'. Fastest and cheapest Gemini model. Budget-friendly for quick tasks. [MATH ~65%, speed: very fast]

models.Name: gemini-2.5-flash
models.Description: The 'Reasoning Flash'. Gemini's thinking model — strong reasoning at flash-tier pricing. Excels at complex math with thinking mode. [MATH ~85%, speed: moderate]

models.Name: openai/gpt-4o-mini
models.Description: The 'Reliable Generalist'. GPT-4o Mini via OpenRouter. Fast, cheap, solid baseline for math and reasoning. [MATH ~70%, speed: fast]

models.Name: x-ai/grok-4.1-fast
models.Description: The 'Agile Reasoner'. xAI's fast agentic model via OpenRouter. Strong tool-use and reasoning at budget pricing. [MATH ~75%, speed: fast]

models.Name: deepseek/deepseek-v3.2
models.Description: The 'Math Specialist'. DeepSeek V3.2 via OpenRouter. IMO gold-level math reasoning at bargain pricing. [MATH ~90%, speed: moderate]
